title: Crispy Cassava Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and crunchy stir fry made with cassava and savory flavors, inspired by Vietnamese cuisine.

ingredients.name: Cassava
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Savory stir-fry mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cassava pieces and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until slightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the savory stir-fry mix and soy sauce.
Pour the stir-fry mix over the cassava and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cassava is coated in the savory mixture.
Season with salt to taste, if desired.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with chopped cilantro.
